The Hidden Cost of AI‑Generated Code

Why Faster Code Writing Is Making Software Worse?

15 min read  ·  April 2026 Read the report →

-7.2% Delivery stability per 25% AI adoption (DORA 2024)

Research Report

The Poisoned Well

Open source packages have become a primary delivery channel for malware — and AI-assisted coding is making it bigger, faster, and stranger. The attacks, the defenses, and what actually works.
